query: SELECT userId, ministryId, COUNT(*) as count FROM citizenDelegates GROUP BY userId, ministryId HAVING count > 1 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2TEpAERBP1fyn7r.root --database U6pRes7wCe3Tq4MFFrBU3d --execute SELECT userId, ministryId, COUNT(*) as count FROM citizenDelegates GROUP BY userId, ministryId HAVING count > 1 LIMIT 10;
